summary: Iteration 16 testing complete: All new features verified working. Hamburger menu now includes 'Impostazioni' (Settings). Settings page shows Notification section with 'Versetto del Giorno' toggle and 'Invia notifica di test' button (correctly translated). Google login redirects to auth.emergentagent.com correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 added Settings to hamburger menu, notifications section, and test notification button. All features verified working.

email_password_login.details: Login with testbible@cibospirituale.it / Test123! works correctly, redirects to home page

google_login_redirect.details: Clicking 'Continua con Google' redirects to auth.emergentagent.com with correct redirect URL: https://auth.emergentagent.com/?redirect=https%3A%2F%2Famen-google-login.preview.emergentagent.com%2Fauth-callback

hamburger_menu_shows_impostazioni.details: Menu now shows 6 items: Home, Bibbia, Diario, Profilo, Donazioni, Impostazioni

settings_page_accessible.details: Settings page loads via /settings URL or hamburger menu > Impostazioni

settings_notifications_section.details: Notifiche section visible with 'Versetto del Giorno' toggle and description 'Ricevi un versetto ogni mattina'

settings_test_notification_button.details: 'Invia notifica di test' button present with bell icon (🔔), translation key 'sendTestNotification' working correctly

donations_paypal_iban.details: PayPal (andrehangar@live.it) and Bonifico Bancario (Revolut Bank UAB) options visible

community_loads_messages.details: Community page shows messages from multiple users with country flags, input field for sharing

translations_verified.notificationTime: Not visible in current view (appears when toggle enabled)

console_warnings.expo_notifications_web: [expo-notifications] Listening to push token changes is not yet fully supported on web - This is expected behavior per requirements
